title: Cobblemon EngineMc
description: Client-side modpack for the Cobblemon gamemode on EngineMC, an Italian Minecraft server. Includes Cobblemon addons, performance mods and quality of life improvements.
body:
## Italiano
 
**Modpack ufficiale di EngineMC** — Modalita' Cobblemon
 
IP del server: cobblemon.enginemc.it
 
Questa modpack e' la configurazione ufficiale consigliata per giocare alla modalita' **Cobblemon** su EngineMC, un server Minecraft completamente italiano.
 
**Cobblemon** e' una mod che porta i Pokemon nel mondo di Minecraft: puoi incontrare, catturare e allenare creature selvatiche esplorando il mondo, il tutto integrato nello stile visivo di Minecraft. La modalita' su EngineMC espande questa esperienza con sistemi personalizzati, eventi, economy e molto altro.
 
### Cosa include il pack
 
Il pack e' **client-side** e contiene tutte le mod necessarie per connettersi e giocare correttamente al server. Le mod sono organizzate nelle seguenti categorie:
 
**Cobblemon e addon**
Cobblemon, Mega Showdown, Legendary Monuments, CobbleFurnies, Cobbreeding, CobbleDollars, Cobblemon Pokenav, BadgeBox, SimpleTMs, Navas ZA Megas, Radical Cobblemon Trainers, Tim's Cobblemon Edits
 
**Performance e ottimizzazione**
Sodium, Sodium Extra, Lithium, ImmediatelyFast, ModernFix, Entity Culling, Clumps, spark
 
**Mappe e navigazione**
Xaero's Minimap, Xaero's World Map, Litematica
 
**Qualita' della vita**
Jade, Just Enough Items (JEI), Mod Menu, BetterF3, Better Ping Display, Mouse Tweaks, Zoomify, Gamma Utils, Freelook, Chat Tools, Simple Voice Chat, Essential
 
La lista completa e aggiornata delle mod e' disponibile nella sezione **Versioni**.
 
### Perche' scaricarla
 
- Configurazione **testata e pronta all'uso**: nessun conflitto, nessun problema di compatibilita'
- **Performance migliorate** rispetto a un'installazione vanilla standard grazie alle mod di ottimizzazione incluse
- **Aggiornata regolarmente** per restare compatibile con le novita' del server
- Impostazioni gia' configurate per evitare i problemi piu' comuni
 
### Note importanti
 
- Alcune meccaniche avanzate e sistemi personalizzati sono disponibili **solo lato server** e non funzioneranno in singleplayer.
- Il server utilizza mod server-side aggiuntive, plugin custom e fix non inclusi in questo pack.
- Tutte le mod appartengono ai rispettivi autori e creatori.
 
Supportaci votando: [MC Italia](https://minecraft-italia.net/lista/server/enginemc)
Supporto e assistenza: [Discord EngineMC](https://discord.enginemc.it)
 
---
 
## English
 
**Official EngineMC Modpack** — Cobblemon Gamemode
 
Server IP: cobblemon.enginemc.it
 
This modpack is the official recommended configuration to play the **Cobblemon** gamemode on EngineMC, a fully Italian Minecraft server.
 
**Cobblemon** is a mod that brings Pokemon into the world of Minecraft: you can encounter, catch, and train wild creatures while exploring, all seamlessly integrated into Minecraft's visual style. The gamemode on EngineMC expands this experience with custom systems, events, economy, and much more.
 
### What's included
 
The pack is **client-side only** and contains all the mods required to connect and play correctly on the server. Mods are organized into the following categories:
 
**Cobblemon and addons**
Cobblemon, Mega Showdown, Legendary Monuments, CobbleFurnies, Cobbreeding, CobbleDollars, Cobblemon Pokenav, BadgeBox, SimpleTMs, Navas ZA Megas, Radical Cobblemon Trainers, Tim's Cobblemon Edits
 
**Performance and optimization**
Sodium, Sodium Extra, Lithium, ImmediatelyFast, ModernFix, Entity Culling, Clumps, spark
 
**Maps and navigation**
Xaero's Minimap, Xaero's World Map, Litematica
 
**Quality of life**
Jade, Just Enough Items (JEI), Mod Menu, BetterF3, Better Ping Display, Mouse Tweaks, Zoomify, Gamma Utils, Freelook, Chat Tools, Simple Voice Chat, Essential
 
The full and up-to-date mod list is available in the **Versions** section.
 
### Why download it
 
- **Tested and ready to use**: no conflicts, no compatibility issues out of the box
- **Improved performance** compared to a standard vanilla installation thanks to the included optimization mods
- **Regularly updated** to stay compatible with new server features
- Pre-configured settings to avoid the most common issues
 
### Important notes
 
- Some advanced mechanics and custom systems are available **server-side only** and will not work in singleplayer.
- The server runs additional server-side mods, custom plugins, and fixes not included in this pack.
- All mods belong to their respective authors and creators.
 
Support us by voting: [MC Italia](https://minecraft-italia.net/lista/server/enginemc)
Support and assistance: [Discord EngineMC](https://discord.enginemc.it)
